sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ مُحَمَّدٌ كِيسًا أَمَامَ بَابِ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Muhammed je pronašao vrećicu ispred kućnih vrata.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad found a bag in front of the house door.

sentences.translation: U njoj je bio svježi hljeb i mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: In it there was fresh bread and milk.

sentences.translation: Pitao je komšije ali niko nije znao.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his neighbours and no one knew.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ رَأَى أُمَّهُ تَضَعُ الْكِيسَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Sedmicu kasnije vidio je majku kako stavlja vrećicu rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: A week later he saw his mother putting the bag early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: عَرَفَ أَنَّهَا تَفْعَلُ هَذَا لِجِيرَانِهِمُ الْكِبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Shvatio je da to radi za njihove starije komšije.
sentences.translationEn: He realised that she did this for their elderly neighbours.
